metadata.description: Personal Claude plugin collection for professional work

plugins.name: atlassian-tools
plugins.description: Read-only Atlassian access via MCP server with deep Jira issue research skill, JQL search, Confluence pages, CQL search, and attachments.

plugins.name: playwright-typescript-code-review
plugins.description: Repository-aware Playwright TypeScript code reviewer. Discovers local coding standards before reviewing diffs for reliability, maintainability, and correctness. Returns structured local findings — never posts to GitHub.

plugins.name: claude-retrospective
plugins.description: Comprehensive analysis of Claude Code sessions to identify successful patterns, problematic areas, and opportunities for improvement.
